title: Android/Java calibration refinements

sources.reason: Document host JDK 21 as an external prerequisite and explain Android/Java calibration starting points.
Explain the Android-friendly calibration flow and staged CI order.
Record the Android/Java recovery path when preset commands or Gradle checks need calibration.
Show Android Java coverage boundaries, flavor boundaries, and report-only guard guidance.
Convert Android preset commands into calibration starting points without changing other stacks.

riskAssessment.reason: The change is limited to Android/Java docs and preset comments, but task-name and boundary guidance must stay precise.

executionDecision.reason: Scope, sources, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that Android task names are framed as calibration starting points, not guaranteed defaults.
Keep the default coverage policy broad and report-only in the examples and docs.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints so scope, acceptance, and Android calibration guidance stay visible during the edit.

acceptance: docs/configuration.md and docs/getting-started/installation.md state that Android/Java requires a host JDK 21 and the template does not install or manage JDK versions.

docs/configuration.md and docs/reference/troubleshooting.md explain the Android-friendly calibration flow: verify the Gradle wrapper first, then replace preset quality commands, then wire L1 and L2 CI.

examples/java/README.md explains Android coverage and flavor boundaries, including app/src/main/**, */src/main/**, app/src/test/**, and app/src/androidTest/**, and keeps the default coverage policy report-only at first.
templates/stacks/android.mk keeps default commands but marks them as calibration starting points for actual variant-specific task names.
guidelines: Document host JDK 21 as an external prerequisite rather than a template-managed dependency.
Keep Android preset commands and coverage guidance as calibration starting points and do not change the default coverage policy in this task.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert the doc and template edits made for Android/Java calibration guidance.
